added_claims: PHQ-2 depression screening performed with total score 1/6, indicating low risk

reasons: Insertion matches evidence: PHQ-2 total score 1/6 low risk, supported by transcript span and FHIR Observation (LOINC 55758-7, value 1).
No existing PHQ-2 or mood screening mention in note; the SDOH/mental health screening content is distinct.
Objective section is appropriate for a screening tool score, consistent with DAST-10 and PRAPARE already listed under Screenings.
